meta.title: Identify the Hand
meta.description: Identify the best possible hand from a set of cards.

blocks.content:
## Identify the Hand

Look at the cards and name the best possible five-card hand. Practice reading boards quickly and confidently — the more you do it, the more natural it becomes!

blocks.title: Hand Identification Drill
blocks.instructions: For each problem, identify the best five-card poker hand that can be made from the cards shown.
